case_title: DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT VS. ADVANTAGE SOLUTIONS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-28-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ADVANTAGE SOLUTIONS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADVANTAGE SOLUTIONS IS NOT PRESENT. RHIANNA HUGHES ATTEMPTED TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM FOR ADVANTAGE SOLUTIONS. THE DEFENDANT'S ZOOM REQUEST WAS REJUECTED AND MS. HUGHES IS AN ATTORNEY AND NOT ALLOWED TO APPEAR FOR AN ENTITY IN SMALL CLAIMS. ZOOM CRASHED 30 MINUTES INTO THE COURT'S SMALL CLAIMS 1:30PM AND WAS NEVER RESTORED BY COURT SUPPORT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: A. OVERTON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY ROESSLER WEINERT, DIANE [FULL NAME: DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT CRAIG] AS TO DEFENDANT ADVANTAGE SOLUTIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST SERVE DEFENDANT, FORWARDED TO THE COURT BY: IRVINE POLICE DEPARTMENT.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANTAGE SALES AND MARKETING HOLDINGS, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ADVANTAGE SALES AND MARKETING HOLDINGS, LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-08-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DIANE ROESSLER WEINERT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADVANTAGE SOLUTIONS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION TO REQUEST CHANGE OF ADDRESS IS RECEIVED AND UPDATED BY COURTROOM CLERK IN THE SYSTEM AND FILED. ***PLAINTIFF REQUESTED TO CONTINUE THE CASE TO JANUARY 05, 2024 @10:00 A.M. HAS BEEN DENIED***. COURT ONLY ALLOWING FOR 6 MONTHS CONTINUANCE, SO CASE IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 8, 2023 @10:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 506. VOICEMAIL HAS BEEN LEFT TO PLAINTIFF TO INFORM OF CONTINUED DATE AND PROVIDED REMINDER TO UPDATE THE COURT DATE ON SC-100 CLAIM FORM TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT WITH THE NEW COURT DATE & TIME OF SEPTEMBER 8, 2023 @10:00 A.M. IN DEPT 506. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
